calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-02-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up as to the cross complaint.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
John C. Riccio esq. for plaintiff: Leslie Funsten.
Lawrence E. Hart esq. for defendants/cross-complainants: Ronald Joshua Harris and Denco Sales Co.
No appearance by cross-defendants, Wagner's Auto Body & Repair and Lorenz Wagner III.
Order striking the cross-defendants' answer to the cross complaint and the cross defendant's default was granted and entered on March 2, 2006, by Dept. 612.
In open court, Mr. Hart motioned to move plaintiff's counsel, Mr. Riccio, in as associated counsel. Court granted the motion.
Cross complainants' witness: Leslie Funsten and David Jacobs, were sworn and directly examined.
Exhibit 1 - Estimate Repair Invoice from Wagner's Autobody......ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Estimate by BMW of San Francisco......ID/EVID
Exhibit 3 - Enterprise Invoice......ID/EVID
Exhibit 4 - Insurance Invoice......ID/EVID
Exhibit 5 - Registration of vehicle......ID/EVID
Exhibit 6 - CSAA Estimate......ID/EVID
Exhibit 7 - Estimate by BMW of San Francisco......ID/EVID
Exhibit 8 - Invoice from The Sign Factory......ID/EVID
Exhibit 9 - Mr. Jacob's Appraisal Report......ID/EVID
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the cross complainants against cross Defendants as follows:
Total damages of $40,826.19 and costs of $320.00
Counsel to prepare judgment, and parties stipulated for the return of exhibits in open court.
The complaint has been settled, pending final settlement. Matter is put on CRC 225 calendar in department 212 for May 2, 2006, at 10:00 a.m. for dismissal of the complaint.

Judgment was signed by Commissioner Sue Kaplan on March 7, 2006.
